name: investigation-registration
description: Investigating an anomalous spike in registrations detected on 2026-04-07. Z-Score anomaly detection flagged 2 IOCs: two Microsoft Edge user-agent strings (Chrome/138 Edg/138 and Chrome/139 Edg/139) with 671 and 515 registrations respectively (1,186 total). Need to determine if this is bot/automation activity, a coordinated abuse campaign, or a false positive.

artifacts.description: Anomaly detection alert for registration spike on 2026-04-07-00

data.method: Anomaly Detection using Z-Scores with a Moving Window

iocs_detected.ioc: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/138.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/138.0.0.0
Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/139.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/139.0.0.0
